figures.caption: Figure 4: Token-wise attention reallocation from Q to Q′. Q′ reallocate attention from sink tokens and stopwords to semantically-meaningful tokens.
Table 1: Performance of prompting techniques across various reasoning benchmarks.
Table 2: Stability and self-consistency comparison accross various prompting methods.
Table 3: Robustness analysis on ambiguous prompt accross various prompting methods.

Figure 1: Framework of DisambiguSLM. We propose a prompt optimization method via semantic disambiguation. Specifically, we identify semantic risks, perform dual-path verification and conflict resolution, and conduct semantic integration to produce a non-ambiguous input prompt for LLM inference.
Figure 5: Evaluation on the sensitivity of similarity threshold.
Figure 2: Layer-wise focus ratio comparison between Q and Q′. Q′ significantly improves the attention focus in reasoning layers.
Figure 3: Comparison of joint distribution of entropyfocus ratio between Q and Q′. Q′ shifts high focus region for low entropy and low focus region for high entropy.
